**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Maohua Electronic Equipment Manufacturing Co., Ltd. presents a definitive case of a defunct legacy manufacturer exhibiting severe registry misclassification. The 'Apple Inc.' hallucination has been completely eradicated. While officially tagged as a 'Small' manufacturer of 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment', the physical metrics completely falsify this: established in 1995 in central Nanjing (Xuanwu District), it holds a micro-capitalization of only 600,000 RMB and reports exactly 0 insured employees for 2024. Advanced electronic manufacturing requires significant capital, cleanrooms, and a specialized workforce. Furthermore, its recovered business scope is an incoherent mix of 1990s trading activities, encompassing 'building materials, auto parts, general merchandise, textiles, and chemical raw materials'. This confirms the entity is not an active high-tech manufacturer, but rather a defunct 90s-era trading/assembly shell that has lost all physical operations and survives merely as a dormant registration.
